---
title: 'Two thoughts'
date: '2013-09-10T04:02:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '4780096860796419851'
blogger_filename: '/2013/09/two-thoughts.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'study'
---

<span style="font-family: Calibri, sans-serif; font-size: x-small;">“Submission recognizes the  need for authority in order to avoid chaos while bringing meaning and  direction to a particular group. We should measure any direction given  by the standard of God’s Word before we decide whether or not to obey  it.” Mac Hammond</span><br /><br /><span style="font-family: Calibri, sans-serif; font-size: x-small;">Are you worried and fretting over your job? Are you fighting them over their decisions? </span><span style="font-family: Calibri, sans-serif; font-size: x-small;">How can you give God the care of your business when you can't even let your company have the care of theirs? </span>
